stemHtml: Of the statements below, which correctly describes either the coalescence process or the Wegener-Bergeron-Findeisen process of precipitation formation?

options.a: The coalescence process involves collisions between differently sized water droplets.
options.b: The coalescence process involves mixing of differently sized ice crystals.
options.c: The Wegener-Bergeron-Findeisen process primarily involves mixing of ice crystals and supercooled water droplets of different sizes.
options.d: The Wegener-Bergeron-Findeisen process involves collisions of ice crystals and forms only moderate to heavy precipitation.
